descs.desc: [BeforeAttack] Remove 1 random removable negative effect applied to self
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict +2 Tremor Count; Inflict (Wrath A-Reson. /3) additional Tremor Count
[OnSucceedAttack] Trigger Tremor Burst

descs.desc: [BeforeAttack] Remove 1 random removable negative effect applied to self
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict +2 Tremor Count; Inflict (Wrath A-Reson. /3) additional Tremor Count
[OnSucceedAttack] Trigger Tremor Burst
If target does not have a Stagger Threshold upon Tremor Burst,
Deal Wrath Damage by (6 + 2x(Wrath A-Reson.))% of the final Stagger Threshold raised

descs.desc: [BeforeAttack] Remove 2 random removable negative effects applied to self
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict +3 Tremor Count; Inflict (Wrath A-Reson. /3) additional Tremor Count
[OnSucceedAttack] Trigger Tremor Burst
If target does not have a Stagger Threshold upon Tremor Burst,
Deal Wrath Damage by (12 + 3x(Wrath A-Reson.))% of the final Stagger Threshold raised.

descs.desc:
[CantIdentify]
Targets Randomly
[BeforeAttack] If this unit has a negative status effect, Atk Weight +1
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Trigger Tremor Burst.
Amount of Stagger Threshold raised by Tremor Burst increases by 30% of Tremor on target.
Reduce Tremor Count by 1
[EndSkill] Gain 3 Bind and 1 Blunt Power Up next turn.

descs.desc:
[CantIdentify]
Targets Randomly
[BeforeAttack] If this unit has a negative status effect, Atk Weight +1
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Trigger Tremor Burst
Amount of Stagger Threshold raised by Tremor Burst increases by 40% of Tremor on target.
If target does not have a Stagger Threshold upon Tremor Burst,
Deal Wrath Damage by (6 + 2x(Wrath A-Reson.))% of the final Stagger Threshold raised
Reduce Tremor Count by 1
[EndSkill] Gain 3 Bind and 1 Blunt Power Up next turn.

descs.desc:
[CantIdentify]
Targets Randomly
[BeforeAttack] If this unit has a negative status effect, Atk Weight +2
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Trigger Tremor Burst
Amount of Stagger Threshold raised by Tremor Burst increases by 50% of Tremor on target.
If target does not have a Stagger Threshold upon Tremor Burst,
Deal Wrath Damage by (12 + 3x(Wrath A-Reson.))% of the final Stagger Threshold raised
Reduce Tremor Count by 1
[EndSkill] Gain 3 Bind and 1 Blunt Power Up next turn.

2050511.name: Bound Wrath
2050511.desc:
This unit's leftmost skill on the Dashboard loses 1 Base Power and gains 2 Coin Power
At the start of the turn, if at 4- Speed, gain 1 Blunt Power Up
